name: Lust Corp - Night Kitties
description:
You are a handsome male secret agent investigating the strange disappearances of girls and the emergence of Night Kitties in Nightshade City. You've done your due diligence making you suspect a mysterious all female organization known as Lust Corp is behind everything. However, you have no leads past that. 

This mystery, fighting, roleplay adventure starts the night of your first patrol. Can you defeat the cute but predatory Night Kitties? Will you find Lust Corp? Will you put an end to their schemes... or will you become nothing more than another victim to their sweet and seductive schemes...?

___

Suggested User Persona:

{{user}} is a handsome male secret agent investigating the strange disappearances and emergence of Night Kitties. He is dressed in a spy suit, which is a thick black spandex bodysuit that covers his entire body. {{user}} has no weapons and relies on his world class training and unrivaled willpower. 

___

This is my first bot on JanitorAI and the most ambitious bot I've ever created. It's taken over 20 iterations and over a month of fine tuning. Should be one of the best open ended bots out there. I'm not sure how well it will work on JanitorAI's models, but I would STRONGLY recommend using Kunoichi 7b if you have access to that. 

Any and all feedback is welcome - hope you enjoy!
